title: SEPOX® Marine Grade Outdoor Padlocks with Key, 40mm Heavy-Duty Solid Brass Lock Weather Proof, SUS304 Stainless Steel Shackle, Rust Proof for Warehouse Container Garage Shed Gate Chain Fishing
features: 📦SUPERIOR BUILD QUALITY: Padlock designed expertly with a heavy duty solid brass body featuring chamfered edges that ensure there are no sharp corners, guaranteeing safety along with security.
🔐UNMATCHED SECURITY: Comes with a 304 Stainless Steel Shackle that is waterproof and specifically engineered to resist cutting and a double lock system inside the padlock for unparalleled protection.
🔑USER CONVENIENCE: Equipped with 2 identical keys for hassle-free access to all locks. Simple to install and easy to handle, making life easier for all users.
🌎WIDE RANGE OF USES: Its versatile design makes it perfect for securing backpacks, tool boxes, gym lockers, gates, fences, and much more. Ideal for both personal and professional use.

💪ADVANCED PROTECTION: Features an advanced double locking mechanism for enhanced security. Further, the internal mechanism is rust-free, ensuring durability and a lifetime of use. Backed by a 10-year warranty by SEPOX.
description: Product Description Stainess steel shackle Durable Brass Padlock with Stainless Steel Shackle Rust Proof 6MM Diameter Brass lock body 40mm wide lock Perfect for both indoor and outdoor use Brass padlock is ensuring strength and durability for longevity Brass lock cylinder Brass lock cylinder is high reliable and secure locking mechanism Handle a variety of complex environments and be more durable Designed for outdoor use Easy open with key 2 keys per lock Wied use Rust proof outdoor padlock 40mm waterproof padlock is ideal for securing lockers, gates, tool boxes, and more.
